# `state.int`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Allocate or read a persistent integer slot.

## Signature

```ts
int(_init: number): MutableSlot<number> {
    return sentinel("state.int");
}
```

## Example

```ts
const fn: typeof state.int = state.int;
    void fn;
```
